# GitHub repository topics & description

GitHub topics and the **About** description can only be set in the repo UI
(**Settings → About**, the ⚙️ gear next to "About") — not from a file in the repo.
Paste the values below manually. ~2 minutes each.

## UniSchema

**Topics** (paste one per line, or space-separated):

```
webhooks
nonprofit
higher-education
advancement
fundraising
typescript
hono
sqlite
```

**Description** (one line):

> Normalize advancement & fundraising webhooks from 8 CRMs into one validated ConstituentEvent stream. TypeScript + Hono, self-hosted.

## PhilanthroPy (sibling repo — suggested, confirm before applying)

Not specified in the original request; inferred from the ecosystem role. Adjust to taste.

**Topics:**

```
fundraising
nonprofit
advancement
machine-learning
scikit-learn
propensity-modeling
python
```

**Description** (one line):

> sklearn-native machine learning for advancement teams — RFM, donor propensity, and lapse scoring on ConstituentEvent features.
